explanation: This command uses xcopy.exe with the /w flag to simulate a delay, and embeds a PowerShell command to create a .bat.exe file. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of xcopy.exe invoking PowerShell and creating a .bat.exe file.
This command sets the system and hidden attributes on a test.bat.exe file, which matches the Sigma rule's detection of attrib.exe being used with +s and +h flags on a .bat.exe file.
This command uses xcopy.exe with the /w flag and invokes pwsh.exe (PowerShell Core) to create a .bat.exe file, which matches the Sigma rule's detection of pwsh.exe and .bat.exe in the command line.
